name: Olive Garden Capellini Pomodoro
recipeIngredient: 12 oz Dry angel hair pasta, cooked
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat the olive oil in a pan and add the garlic. Cook until the garlic turns white.
2. Add the diced tomatoes and pepper. Stir constantly for 2 to 3 minutes until the tomatoes reach the desired consistency without losing shape.
3. Remove from heat.
4. Transfer the cooked pasta to a large bowl.
5. Gently toss the pasta with the tomato mixture, basil, and half of the Parmesan cheese.
6. Serve immediately and pass remaining Parmesan for serving.
